_meta.method: Claude Code research agent (general-purpose) — multi-network web crawl across Eredeti Fény Zen Közösség (eredetifeny.hu, Kwan Um lineage), Kvanumzen Magyarország (kvanumzen.hu), Tan Kapuja Zen Közösség (zen.hu), One Drop Zen / Egy Csepp Szangha (onedropzen.hu, Rinzai/Sogenji), To Hi Gan Zendo (zendobudapest.hu, Sanbō Zen / Willigis Jäger), Budapest Zen Dojo / Zen Deshimaru (zen-deshimaru.com), and the Buddhapest community directory.
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~75-90% of an estimated 8-14 'umbrella' Hungarian Zen organizations. Eredeti Fény (Kwan Um lineage via Chong An Sunim) reports 30+ regional satellite groups across Hungary, Romania, and Transylvania; the city-level satellites are partially captured.
knownGaps: Eredeti Fény Zen Közösség lists ~30 city sub-groups (e.g. Debrecen, Eger, Győr, Miskolc, Nyíregyháza, Pécs, Sopron, Szeged, Székesfehérvár, Szombathely) without per-group URL/address pages reachable in this pass — only the Esztergom main temple and three Budapest centers are individually listed below; the rest noted in knownGaps.
Tan Kapuja Zen Közösség 'Uszó Elvonulási Központ' rural retreat center mentioned but no public address.
Mokusó Zen Ház (mokushozen.hu) referenced in Buddhapest directory but not independently verified in this pass.
Sōtō Zen Magyarország (sōtōshū-affiliated) — no public Hungarian-language directory found beyond Deshimaru/AZI Budapest dojo.
Some Eredeti Fény locations are in Romania (Csíkszereda, Marosvásárhely, Sepsiszentgyörgy, Nagyvárad/Oradea) and excluded from this Hungary file by definition.

places.name: A Tan Kapuja Zen Közösség (Dharma-terem)
places.lineage: Zen (Tan Kapuja Buddhista Egyház — eclectic Zen)
places.notes: Hungary's oldest Zen community, founded 1989; weekly Wednesday meditation 18:00; +36-1-280-6712, info@zen.hu. Affiliated with the Tan Kapuja Buddhist Church (Dharma Gate).

places.name: Eredeti Fény Zen Közösség — Buddhapesti Zen Központ
places.lineage: Kwan Um (Korean Sŏn — Chong An Sunim)
places.notes: Main Hungarian Kwan Um-lineage Zen center; abbot Chong An Sunim; +36-20-550-1769, eredetifeny@gmail.com.

places.name: Eredeti Fény — Budapest Gazdagrét csoport
places.lineage: Kwan Um (Eredeti Fény / Chong An Sunim)

places.name: Eredeti Fény — Budapest Zugló csoport
places.lineage: Kwan Um (Eredeti Fény / Chong An Sunim)

places.name: Eredeti Fény — Esztergom Főtemplom (Sosei Zen kolostor projekt)
places.lineage: Kwan Um / One Drop adjacent (Eredeti Fény main temple)
places.notes: Main rural temple address listed for Eredeti Fény; +36-20-257-3857.

places.name: Egy Csepp Szangha — One Drop Zen Központ
places.address: 1062 Budapest, Király u. 28 (also Hajós u. 32 satellite)
places.notes: Hungarian One Drop Zen affiliate of Sogenji (Okayama, Japan); led by Halász 'Tokusho' Attila; onedropzendo@gmail.com; +36-30-466-2871.

places.name: One Drop Zen — Budapest XIX. kerület
places.notes: Budapest 19th-district satellite of One Drop Zen.

places.name: One Drop Zen — Garuda központ Székesfehérvár
Kvanumzen — Budapesti Zen Központ
places.notes: Hungarian Kwan Um School of Zen — Budapest main center; guiding teacher Jo Potter JDPS; +36-70-457-0486.

places.name: Kvanumzen — Bajai Zen Központ
places.notes: Baja Kwan Um group; meets at accessible visitor center.

places.name: To Hi Gan Zendo (Át a túlsó partra)
places.lineage: Sanbō Zen / Willigis Jäger (Ko-Un Roshi) lineage
places.notes: Zazen and ceremonial forms after Willigis Jäger (Sanbō Kyodan offshoot); +36-1-337-7353.

places.name: Budapest Zen Dojo (Taisen-ji)
places.lineage: Sōtō (Deshimaru lineage; Zen Deshimaru Buddhist Association)
places.notes: Master Myoken; +36-70-386-2002; founded by Myoken who also leads Hôbo-ji nearby.

places.name: Mokusó Zen Ház
places.lineage: Zen (Hungarian — affiliation undocumented in public sources)
places.notes: Listed in Buddhapest community directory; specific lineage and address not published in this pass.
